title: South Korea's Kospi hits record high amid mixed Asia markets as hopes linger for Mideast peace
summary_full: Korea's Kospi hits fresh intraday high, amid mixed Asian markets as investors brushed aside fresh threats from Trump on Iran ahead of a fragile ceasefire deadline.
summary_public: Korea's Kospi hits fresh intraday high, amid mixed Asian markets as investors brushed aside fresh threats from Trump on Iran ahead of a fragile ceasefire deadline.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: threats from Trump on Iran ahead of a fragile ceasefire
